title: Interest earned on funds of psychiatric hospital patients
doc_html:
§173. Interest earned on funds of psychiatric hospital patients

            Interest earned on funds of patients deposited with the psychiatric hospital shall be remitted to the individual patient.

            Added by Acts 1954, No. 427, §2; Acts 2017, No. 369, §2.
doc_text:
§173.  Interest earned on funds of psychiatric hospital patients
Interest earned on funds of patients deposited with the psychiatric hospital shall be
remitted to the individual patient.
Added by Acts 1954, No. 427, §2; Acts 2017, No. 369, §2.
